title: Crisp Spanish Beans Stir-fry
description: An earthy and comforting dish featuring crisp Spanish beans drizzled with a low-carb-friendly Chinese sesame sauce.
instructions: Trim the Spanish beans and slice them into thin strips.
Clean and chop the garlic finely.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced beans and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped garlic to the skillet and stir for an additional minute.
Stir in Chinese Sesame Sauce, ensuring it coats the beans evenly.
Fold in dumplings and water chestnuts.
Cook everything together for another 2-3 minutes or until dumplings are fully cooked.
